notes: Only the English instruction field is passed to SimLingo.
A non-scored warm-up uses the same instruction-following call as the single-command test before phase-one measurement begins.
The route is clear daytime and has no active Bench2Drive scenarios.
Its off-map metadata anchor only works around the evaluator's scenario_configs[0] assumption and is filtered before scenario construction.
Moving background traffic and parked-vehicle spawning are disabled only for this isolated Scene 1 run.
The 2.2 km geometry is cropped from Town12 training route 11, waypoints 5 through 12.
The right-turn phase is synchronized with the expected navigation command near 0.75 km and fails explicitly if that command is missed.

The post-turn westbound road is used by the source route's same-direction ConstructionObstacle and ParkedObstacle scenarios, providing a legal left-lane opportunity without instantiating those scenarios here.
The final speed commands preserve the competition units; separate m/s diagnostics remain available in the single-command suite.

warmup.instruction: Keep the vehicle in the current lane.
warmup.translation_zh: 非计分起步观察：保持车辆在当前车道内行驶。
warmup.expected_behavior: Use the same model input as the single S1-01 test and begin phase-one measurement only after the ego is moving.

phases.instruction: Keep the vehicle in the current lane.
phases.translation_zh: 保持车辆在当前车道内行驶。
phases.expected_behavior: Remain centered in the current lane during the initial segment.

phases.instruction: Accelerate to sixty kilometers per hour.
phases.translation_zh: 加速到每小时六十公里。
phases.expected_behavior: Increase speed smoothly toward 60 km/h while respecting safety constraints.

phases.instruction: Turn right at the next intersection.
phases.expected_behavior: Follow the route's next right-turn branch without leaving the legal lane.

phases.instruction: Change to the lane on the left when it is safe.
phases.translation_zh: 确认安全后变到左侧车道。
phases.expected_behavior: Complete one safe left lane change and stabilize in the adjacent lane.

phases.instruction: Slow down to forty kilometers per hour.
phases.translation_zh: 减速到每小时四十公里。
phases.expected_behavior: Reduce speed smoothly toward 40 km/h and continue following the route.
